text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables
17
md_testfup: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often MD ofﬁce follow up with test results
SAS Format: OFA
2: SOMETIMES
3: USUALLY
4: ALWAYS
md_visits: RECODE : Last 6 mths, number of in-person/phone/video visits with personal MD about health
SAS Format: NMA
0: NONE
1: 1 TIME
2: 2
3: 3
4: 4
5: 5 TO 9
6: 10 OR MORE TIMES
mhs: RECODE : Rate overall mental health
SAS Format: RTB
1: EXCELLENT
2: VERY GOOD
3: GOOD
4: FAIR
5: POOR
pd_ezrxmail: RECODE : Last 6 mths, easy to use
